steps.title: Identify the basis for the critics' praise
steps.content: The passage states critics “praised Tsang for creatively transforming a museum rotunda” through projection and sound. The key signal is that they valued her original, innovative approach.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: ”Inventive” directly captures the original, creative thinking that critics praised in her transformative approach. The other choices either reduce the quality to limitation (restrained) or to something incomprehensible (inexplicable and mystifying), neither of which fits praise for specific creative choices. That matches choice B — B is correct.
